note: Brings the dev-time .mjs TOOLING (tools/buildspec + tools/novakai) into the novakai map for the first time. The map is bundled --dir src only, so the ~31 load-bearing modules that RUN the loop are invisible to it. SCOPE: structure-only, mirroring subagent-contract.plan.json / phase-h.plan.json — .mjs is NOT verified by novakai:gate (ts-morph allowJs:false); real verification is each module's node --test suite (npm run spec:test:all) + novakai:replay. Validated by novakai:plan-check, NOT plan-cert. Architectural by design (6 subsystems = loop stages, drill-in members, real edges) so novakai-lint's anti-file-mirror rule holds. EXCLUDED (not architecture): *.test.mjs, __fixtures__, route-repro*.mjs. IMPLEMENTATION after approval: author tools/<folder>/novakai.mmd fragments + a tooling root, then extend novakai:bundle to also scan tools/ (or a sibling tooling bundle).

phases.title: buildspec pipeline
phases.subtitle: the code↔map engine the whole loop stands on

phases.title: map integrity
phases.subtitle: the chain that makes the map true + complete

phases.title: plan + approve
phases.subtitle: the review→approval gates that mint the bundle

phases.title: dependency edges
phases.subtitle: the real call/reuse graph + tooling→app blast radius

intent.problem: The buildspec pipeline (tools/buildspec/*) turns code↔map: it parses the .mmd dialect, extracts real TS signatures, and gates code against the spec. It is the engine the whole loop stands on, yet no node represents it — the map cannot describe its own generator.
intent.approach: Add a top-level subsystem node grouping the 9 pipeline modules (parser, skeleton, stub-gen, extract, diff, gate, scaffold, acceptance, slice). Structure-only: the gate is ts-morph allowJs:false so .mjs carries no fm signature; real verification is each module's --test suite (spec:test:all).

intent.problem: Six commands (bundle/validate/lint/coverage/exports/edges) chained by novakai:ship are what MAKE the map trustworthy — yet they are themselves absent from it. The trust substrate is unmapped.
intent.approach: Add a subsystem node grouping the integrity chain. Each member is a guard the ship pipeline runs in order; edges show the chain and the src/ invariants each enforces.

intent.problem: Onboarding, comprehension self-test and trust-tiering (Keystone 1) are the door a 0-context agent comes through, but the door is not on the map it opens.
intent.approach: Add a subsystem node grouping onboard, quiz and trust-report; edges show onboard shelling the integrity chain and quiz/trust reading the verified map.

intent.problem: Verified work-state (status), computed roadmap, and handoff-freshness are how a session resumes without prose — derived-state continuity — but they are invisible to the map they keep honest.
intent.approach: Add a subsystem node grouping status, roadmap and handoff-fresh; edges show status reusing extract for live signatures.

intent.problem: plan-check (C3 coherence), plan-cert (C2 dry-run cert) and approve-export (E1 mint) are the review→approval gates that produce the very plan.json + bundle the editor consumes — the loop's hinge, unmapped.
intent.approach: Add a subsystem node grouping the three gates; edges show their reuse of the pipeline and their parallel to src/core/plan.

intent.problem: The Phase G/H spine (canonical, contract, contract-gate, verify-change, replay, waves, orchestrate) is what makes subagents provably trustworthy — novakai's headline vision — and it has never been drawn.
intent.approach: Add a subsystem node grouping the 7 spine modules; edges show the call graph (orchestrate→waves→status, contract→plan.downstreamCone) and canonical as the shared determinism primitive.

intent.problem: Zero-dep parser + canonical serializer for the .mmd dialect (parseMmd/toMmd/realNodeIds/KINDS); the single source of truth every other tool imports. Must agree with src/io/mermaid (A3 conformance). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "module" drilled in under novakaiBuildspec.

intent.problem: Computes the canonical contract skeleton of a node (kind/parent/members/arity/return) + all type-normalization (normType, ifaceParams, returnsValue); shared by stub-gen, extract and gate so both sides produce comparable output. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "module" drilled in under novakaiBuildspec.

intent.problem: Step 1 — reads the .mmd spec and emits TS stubs + .contract.ts into src/contracts so interface drift becomes a tsc error (generate). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiBuildspec.

intent.problem: Step 2 — ts-morph walks src/ and re-serializes real code structure into a code .mmd; also writes public/bodies.json for the in-app source viewer (extract/extractFromMap). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiBuildspec.

intent.problem: Pure structural diff between two skeleton maps (diffSkeletons): categorizes unbuilt/unplanned/kind/parent/member/arity/return/type mismatches. No I/O. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "module" drilled in under novakaiBuildspec.

intent.problem: Step 3 — the deterministic CI enforcement point: diffs committed spec .mmd vs extracted code .mmd and exits non-zero on any drift. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiBuildspec.

intent.problem: Author aid — --init bootstraps fragments, --backfill injects real TS signatures, --add-from-plan appends approved-plan nodes to fragments (addFromPlan). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiBuildspec.

intent.problem: Keystone 2 (E2) — runs behavioural cases from a plan against REAL implemented src exports (resolved via %% src), proving a change is correct, not just correctly-shaped (runAcceptance/srcDirectives/collectCases). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiBuildspec.

intent.problem: Pure model slicer (sliceModel/filterBodies/sliceToMmd): reduces a parsed map to a seed node's neighbourhood and filters bodies.json to the kept set. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "module" drilled in under novakaiBuildspec.

intent.problem: Merges root.mmd + every src/**/*.novakai.mmd fragment into one _bundle.mmd, namespacing private ids; the map's build step (currently --dir src only — extending it to tools/ is the implementation of THIS plan). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiIntegrity.

intent.problem: Grammar gate — one header, unique node ids, every edge/parent/kind/fm:meta reference resolves, exactly one %% kind per node. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiIntegrity.

intent.problem: Architecture-altitude gate — fails on FLAT-MAP / LOOSE-BAG so the map can never degrade into a flat file-mirror (lint). This is the rule THIS plan is designed to satisfy. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiIntegrity.

intent.problem: File-completeness guard — every src/ .ts file is %% src-pointed or has a sibling fragment, else fail. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiIntegrity.

intent.problem: Symbol-completeness guard (A1) — ts-morph enumerates every exported symbol; each must be a node or an audited curation-allowlist entry. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiIntegrity.

intent.problem: Edge-integrity guard (A5) — every edge is import-backed, intra-file, or an audited advisory; --strict fails on any unaccounted edge so blast-radius is code-backed (verifyEdges). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiIntegrity.

intent.problem: The single verifiable door — shells novakai:verify (the integrity chain), emits the 3 durable invariants, prints quiz + roadmap. The SessionStart hook runs this. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiUnderstand.

intent.problem: Keystone 1 — generates structural questions from _bundle.mmd and scores answers against live re-derived keys (no key file on disk). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiUnderstand.

intent.problem: Tiers every claim VERIFIED / ADVISORY / UNVERIFIED so a reader knows which facts are CI-enforced vs prose. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiUnderstand.

intent.problem: Verified work-state — compares a plan's proposed signatures against live code (ts-morph) → built / pending / drifted / missing per change. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiContinuity.

intent.problem: Computes roadmap phase status from predicates in roadmap.json (file/grep/cmd/manual); --audit-doc enforces the no-prose-status ban in CLAUDE.md. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiContinuity.

intent.problem: F3/F4 — detects when SESSION_HANDOFF.md lags src/+tools/ commits; checkContentClaims falsifies "not yet committed" prose against git. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiContinuity.

intent.problem: C3 authoring-time coherence — real ids, acyclic deps, valid parents, coherent accepted set (checkPlan). The gate THIS plan is validated by. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiPlanApprove.

intent.problem: C2 dry-run certificate — applies the plan to the spec and runs generate→tsc→extract→gate as a delta vs base, certifying no new drift (applyPlanToSpec/certifyPlan). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiPlanApprove.

intent.problem: E1 mint — applies accepted changes and writes the build bundle: approved.mmd + contracts/ + filtered plan.json + CHECKLIST.md (approveExport). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiPlanApprove.

intent.problem: The determinism primitive — key-sorted JSON + SHA-256 (canonicalize/canonicalJSON/sha256hex/hashOf) so every packet/verdict is a hash compare, not a prose assertion. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "module" drilled in under novakaiContractSpine.

intent.problem: Emits a byte-deterministic per-change execution packet for a 0-context subagent by ROUTING (not recomputing) blast-radius (core/plan downstreamCone), source location and coherence. It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiContractSpine.

intent.problem: PreToolUse hook — denies an Agent/Task spawn carrying NOVAKAI-CONTRACT:<id> unless the contract resolves clean; fails open otherwise (G4). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiContractSpine.

intent.problem: Folds status (structural) + acceptance (behavioural) into a data-only byte-deterministic verdict PASS / PASS_UNPROVEN / FAIL; --strict refuses to treat unproven as proven (G2/H3). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiContractSpine.

intent.problem: Determinism harness — runs a command N times and asserts one stdout hash; the binding proof the spine routes rather than judges (G3). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiContractSpine.

intent.problem: Computes the topological wave partition of unbuilt changes (wave 0 = dispatchable) from dependsOn + live status, with cycle detection (G5). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiContractSpine.

intent.problem: The autonomous driver — waves → per-change git-worktree + contract → verify-change verdict → canonical hashed summary; stdout byte-stable (proven by replay) (H4). It runs the loop but is invisible to the map — the omission this plan closes.
intent.approach: Map it as a "service" drilled in under novakaiContractSpine.

intent.problem: subsystem-level dependency "novakaiUnderstand → novakaiIntegrity" (onboard shells ship chain) — the top-level blast radius
subsystem-level dependency "novakaiContinuity → novakaiBuildspec" (status reuses extract) — the top-level blast radius
subsystem-level dependency "novakaiPlanApprove → novakaiBuildspec" (cert/approve reuse pipeline) — the top-level blast radius
subsystem-level dependency "novakaiContractSpine → novakaiContinuity" (verify/waves shell status) — the top-level blast radius
subsystem-level dependency "novakaiContractSpine → novakaiPlanApprove" (contract uses plan-check) — the top-level blast radius
subsystem-level dependency "novakaiContractSpine → novakaiBuildspec" (contract/verify reuse acceptance) — the top-level blast radius
subsystem-level dependency "novakaiBuildspec → mermaid" (two-parser conformance (A3)) — the top-level blast radius
subsystem-level dependency "novakaiBuildspec → state" (mirrors core/state helpers) — the top-level blast radius
subsystem-level dependency "novakaiBuildspec → files" (produces bodies.json) — the top-level blast radius
subsystem-level dependency "novakaiPlanApprove → plan" (parallels core/plan) — the top-level blast radius
subsystem-level dependency "novakaiContractSpine → plan" (downstreamCone) — the top-level blast radius
dependency "novakaiGate → novakaiExtract" (diff vs code) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiGate → novakaiDiffCore" (diffSkeletons) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiDiffCore → novakaiSkeleton" (skeleton) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiExtract → novakaiMmdParse" (parse/emit) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiSpecToStubs → novakaiMmdParse" (parse) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiSpecToStubs → novakaiSkeleton" (skeleton) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiScaffold → novakaiExtract" (real sigs) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiSliceCore → novakaiMmdParse" (toMmd) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiMmdParse → mermaid" (two-parser conformance (A3)) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiExtract → files" (bodies.json) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiAcceptance → state" (runs real src exports) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiDiffCore → diff" (shared diff) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiSliceCore → slice" (slice semantics) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiBundle → novakaiValidate" (ship 1) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiValidate → novakaiLint" (ship 2) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiLint → novakaiCoverage" (ship 3) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiCoverage → novakaiExports" (ship 4) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiExports → novakaiGate" (ship 5 (gate)) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiGate → novakaiEdges" (ship 6) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiLint → novakaiMmdParse" (parseMmd) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiEdges → novakaiMmdParse" (parseMmd) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiLint → state" (containerOf mirror) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiEdges → state" (parent-chain mirror) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiOnboard → novakaiBundle" (shells verify chain) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiOnboard → novakaiRoadmap" (computed roadmap) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiOnboard → novakaiQuiz" (comprehension gate) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiQuiz → novakaiMmdParse" (parse map) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiQuiz → novakaiSkeleton" (arity/return keys) is real in code but absent from the map

dependency "novakaiStatus → novakaiSkeleton" (skeleton compare) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiPlanCheck → novakaiMmdParse" (base ids) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiPlanCheck → plan" (coherence mirror) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiPlanCert → novakaiSkeleton" (skeleton) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiPlanCert → novakaiExtract" (extract) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiPlanCert → novakaiSpecToStubs" (generate stubs) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiPlanCert → novakaiDiffCore" (delta) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiPlanCert → plan" (applyPlan parallel) is real in code but absent from the map
dependency "novakaiApprove → novakaiPlanCert" (applyPlanToSpec) is real in code but absent from the map
